overall.description: Dashcam footage from inside a car driving on a highway at night during a heavy rainstorm. Windshield wipers operate continuously as the vehicle navigates wet roads, curves, tunnels, and passes road signs with limited visibility.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on highway with windshield wipers active against heavy rain

entered.detail: white metal safety barriers lining both sides of the highway
dark silhouettes of trees visible beyond the guardrails

segments.scene_description: The segment shows continuous highway driving at night in heavy rain. The windshield wipers sweep back and forth as headlights illuminate the wet asphalt and metal guardrails lining the road. Trees are barely visible as dark shapes in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway section with warning signage

events.description: approaching a right curve indicated by yellow warning signs
passing junction exit signs on the right side

agents.ego_description: navigating a right-hand curve on the highway while maintaining speed

entered.detail: yellow diamond-shaped sign with black curve symbol
road sign indicating highway exit or junction

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a curved section of highway, passing yellow warning signs and junction exit markers. The road continues to be slick with rain as the driver steers through the gentle right curve.

events.description: passing under a concrete overpass bridge

agents.ego_description: continuing straight on highway passing under overpass structures

entered.detail: series of yellow directional arrows indicating curve

segments.scene_description: The highway straightens out as the vehicle passes under a concrete overpass. Yellow chevron signs line the left side of the road, and the guardrails continue alongside the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway tunnel with blue accent lighting

events.description: entering a tunnel with distinctive blue interior lighting
exiting the tunnel back to open night conditions

agents.ego_description: driving through a tunnel with blue accent lights on the walls

entered.detail: dark opening of highway tunnel with blue lights visible inside
vertical blue LED accent lights lining the tunnel walls
concrete or tiled walls of the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a highway tunnel illuminated by distinctive blue accent lights along the walls. The enclosed space provides temporary shelter from the rain before the car exits back into the open night.

events.description: passing a large green directional highway sign

agents.ego_description: continuing on highway approaching another tunnel entrance

entered.detail: large green directional sign with white text indicating routes
second tunnel opening ahead with blue lighting visible
white lane markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the vehicle passes a green highway directional sign and continues toward a second tunnel entrance visible in the distance. The guardrails return to the sides of the road as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-slicked highway at night, transitioning from open, stormy roads into a series of illuminated tunnels. It begins with the rhythmic sweep of windshield wipers as headlights cut through heavy rain, illuminating wet asphalt and dark, distant trees. As the vehicle navigates a gentle right curve past yellow warning signs, the road straightens out and passes under a concrete overpass lined with chevron markers. The scene then shifts as the car enters a highway tunnel, where the rain vanishes and the environment is bathed in distinctive blue accent lights. Finally, the vehicle exits back into the storm, passing a green directional sign before heading toward a second tunnel entrance visible in the distance.
